title: goodenia eatoniana
intro: Goodenia eatoniana, also known as White Goodenia, is a flowering plant native to Australia, belonging to the Goodenia genus. Traditionally used in Aboriginal medicine, Goodenia eatoniana has been found to have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can be beneficial in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as soothing sore throats, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems. Goodenia eatoniana can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or made into a poultice to apply topically for relief.
